MainContent.scripts:
<script>
$("#iframePromos").load(function(){
try{
    $("#iframePromos")[0].contentWindow.startScrolls();
} catch(err) {}
    resizeIframe();
});
$('#iframePromos').contents().find('body').bind('resize', function(){
    resizeIframe();
}); 
function scrollToDiv(x){
    $('html, body').animate({
        scrollTop: x
    }, 2000);
}
function resizeIframe(){
    document.getElementById('iframePromos').style.height = document.getElementById('iframePromos').contentWindow.document.body.scrollHeight + 10 + 'px';
    document.getElementById('iframePromos').style.width = "100%";
try{
    var lastItem = document.getElementById('iframePromos').contentWindow.document.getElementsByClassName('last_item')[0];
    var size = lastItem.getBoundingClientRect().top + lastItem.scrollHeight + 80;
    document.getElementById('iframePromos').style.height = size + "px";
} catch(err) {}
}



</script>
MainContent.style:
<style type="text/css">#atg_store_contentContainer #atg_store_content{padding-top:0px !important}
body,#atg_store_mediaBannerContainer,#atg_store_content{
background-color: #161616;}

#iframePromos{width:100%;}
.header_cotodig {
    margin-bottom: 0px !important;
}

#atg_store_contentContainer {
    max-width: 100vw;
    margin: 0px auto;
}

.atg_store_scrollablePromotionalContent {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    margin: 0px auto;
}


body, #atg_store_mediaBannerContainer, #atg_store_content {
    background-color: #ebebeb;
}
</style>
MainContent.name: Lunes Anonimo
